name: Oysters Annapolis
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Green Bell Pepper, cored, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cut the oysters into several pieces and place them in half shells on a baking sheet.
3. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients except for the crabmeat.
4. Gently toss the mixture until well combined.
5. Pile the prepared mixture onto each oyster in the shell.
6. Place 1/2 cup of crabmeat over the piled mixture on top of each oyster.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until heated through and bubbling.
8. Serve hot.
